1# Definition for a binary tree node.
2# class TreeNode:
3#     def __init__(self, val=0, left=None, right=None):
4#         self.val = val
5#         self.left = left
6#         self.right = right
7class Solution:
8    def __init__(self):
9        self.res = 0
10        self.rank = 0
11
12    def kthSmallest(self, root: Optional[TreeNode], k: int) -> int:
13        self.traverse(root, k)
14        return self.res
15    
16    def traverse(self, root: Optional[TreeNode], k: int):
17        if not root:
18            return
19        
20        self.traverse(root.left, k)
21
22        self.rank += 1
23        if k == self.rank:
24            self.res = root.val
25            return
26
27        self.traverse(root.right, k)
28
29
